### Load data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

clean_cbb_names <- function(team_name) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    team_name %in% c("Florida St.", "Florida State") ~ "Florida State",
    team_name %in% c("N.C. State", "NC State")       ~ "NC State",
    team_name %in% c("Miami FL", "Miami")             ~ "Miami (FL)",
    TRUE ~ team_name
  )
}

# --- Process Data ------------------------------------------------------------

acc_2004_edges <- readr::read_csv("acc_2004.csv") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    t1 = clean_cbb_names(Team),
    t2 = clean_cbb_names(Opp)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(t1 < t2) |>
  dplyr::group_by(t1, t2) |>
  dplyr::summarise(games = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

acc_2026_edges <- readr::read_csv("acc_2026.csv") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    t1 = clean_cbb_names(team),
    t2 = clean_cbb_names(opp)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(t1 < t2) |>
  dplyr::group_by(t1, t2) |>
  dplyr::summarise(games = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")


# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}
```
:::


### Node graph


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot_node_logos <- function(edge_df, line_color_single, line_color_double,
                            logo_width = 0.05) {
  graph  <- tidygraph::as_tbl_graph(edge_df, directed = FALSE)
  layout <- ggraph::create_layout(graph, layout = "circle")
  
  ggraph::ggraph(layout) +
    ggraph::geom_edge_link(
      ggplot2::aes(
        width = factor(games),
        color = factor(games),
        alpha = factor(games)
      ),
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    cbbplotR::geom_cbb_teams(
      data = layout,
      ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, team = name),
      width = logo_width
    ) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_color_manual(
      values = c("1" = line_color_single, "2" = line_color_double)
    ) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_width_manual(values = c("1" = 0.4, "2" = 2.0)) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_alpha_manual(values = c("1" = 0.25, "2" = 0.85)) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = 0.18)) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = 0.18)) +
    ggplot2::theme_void() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.background  = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin      = ggplot2::margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
    )
}

# --- Generate Plots ----------------------------------------------------------
p1_node <- plot_node_logos(
  acc_2004_edges,
  line_color_single = "#c7e9c0",
  line_color_double = "#31a354"
)

p2_node <- plot_node_logos(
  acc_2026_edges,
  line_color_single = "#fdbe85",
  line_color_double = "#d94701",
)

# --- Panel Titles ------------------------------------------------------------
p1_titled <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(p1_node) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "2003-04: 9 Teams\nRound-robin (play every team twice)",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    fontface = "plain",
    size = 14,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  )

p2_titled <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(p2_node) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "2025-26: 18 Teams\nOnly play two teams twice",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    fontface = "plain",
    size = 14,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  )

# --- Side-by-Side Layout ----------------------------------------------------
side_by_side <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p1_titled,
  p2_titled,
  ncol = 2,
  align = "h"
)

final_plot <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(side_by_side, y = 0.03, height = 0.92) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "ACC Regular Season Scheduling Comparison",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    size = 16,
    fontface = "bold",
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    color = "black",
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  ) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Data via sports-reference.com | Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart",
    x = 0.5,
    y = 0.01,
    size = 11,
    fontface = "italic",
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed",
    color = "gray40",
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "label",
    x = 0.50,
    y = 0.20,
    label = paste0(
      "9 pairs of conference opponents\n",
      "don't play each other:\n\n",
      "Florida State-Louisville\n",
      "Cal-NC State\n",
      "Notre Dame-Wake Forest\n",
      "Stanford-Syracuse\n",
      "Pittsburgh-Virginia Tech\n",
      "Clemson-Virginia\n",
      "Duke-Miami\n",
      "Georgia Tech-SMU\n",
      "Boston College-North Carolina"
    ),
    size = 3.4,
    color = "#333333",
    family = "Roboto Condensed",
    fontface = "plain",
    fill =  "#d94701",
    alpha = 0.4,
    label.padding = ggplot2::unit(6, "pt"),
    label.r = ggplot2::unit(3, "pt"),
    label.size = 0.5,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0.5,
    lineheight = 1.0
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "curve",
    x = 0.50, 
    y = 0.35,
    xend = 0.55, 
    yend = 0.60,
    curvature = -0.3,
    color = "#d94701",
    arrow = ggplot2::arrow(length = grid::unit(2, "mm"))
  )

final_plot
```

::: {.cell-output-display}

:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot2::ggsave(
  "acc_scheduling_comparison.png",
  final_plot,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
